_comment: Illustrative BAD trace fragment: an agent attempted to write the installation token into a committed file. The credential guard + secret scanner REJECT the commit, and the log scrubber redacts the value before this trace is ever stored. The 'attemptedRawSecret' below is a FAKE token assembled from fragments (ghp_ + filler); it is not a real credential. This file documents the reject; it is not applied.

storedAfterScrub.note: log_scrubber.py replaces the match idempotently before persistence

refusal.outcome: run aborted; no commit, no PR
